description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a low, horizontal profile and a simple, rectangular footprint. The exterior walls are primarily light-colored, likely painted wood or stucco, with a flat or gently sloped roof. There is a visible fenced area along one side, constructed from wooden panels, and a patch of green lawn or garden space extending from the front. Several windows are distributed asymmetrically along the facade, and a small porch or entryway is present. The structure appears to be surrounded by some vegetation, and there are visible utility features such as a downspout and possibly an outdoor light fixture.
description: A single-story, light-colored bungalow with a fenced yard, asymmetrical windows, and a small porch, surrounded by greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, porch area, and a stretch of green lawn leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the structure, the fenced area, and some vegetation.
description_view_2: Rear or opposite side view with a clear look at the wooden fence and more of the building's length.
description_view_3: Top-down or angled view emphasizing the green lawn and the entryway, with the house receding into the background.
